title: Asteropterus leyseroides
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Asteropterus leyseroides.
taxonomy: Asteropterus leyseroides is classified in the family Cynipidae, which is a group of gall wasps. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Asteropterus leyseroides belonging to the tribe Cynipini. The species itself falls under the genus Asteropterus, which is a group of wasps that induce galls on oak trees. The classification of Asteropterus leyseroides is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Insecta, Order: Hymenoptera, Family: Cynipidae, Genus: Asteropterus, Species: A. leyseroides. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different species of wasps.
